SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2024 - CONTINUED TO NOV-04-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUN PENG IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY RANDY WALAND. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE ZOOM APPOROVAL. THE COURT HAS NO EVIDENCE FROM THE PLAINTIFF. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 11/4/24 TO BE HEARD WITH ANOTHER CASE WITH THE SAME PARTIES. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE HIS ZOOM REQUEST AND SUBMIT HIS EVIDENCE TO THE COURT AND DEFENDANT AHEAD OF THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-08-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUN PENG, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL, REPRESENTED BY RANDY WALAND IS PRESENT ON ZOOM. A MANDARIN INTERPERTER WAS NOT AVAILABLE TO ASSIST PLAINTIFF. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 1/8/25 AT 1:30 P.M. TO ALLOW FOR A MANDARIN COURT INTERPERTER AND IS TO BE HEARD WITH ANOTHER CASE WITH THE SAME PARTIES. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE HIS ZOOM REQUEST AND SUBMIT HIS EVIDENCE TO THE COURT AND DEFENDANT AHEAD OF THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CASE FILE RETAINED IN COURTROOM TICKLER FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENG, YUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMSTERDAM HOSTEL NOTHING. COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE HIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
